ACKS-ABILITIES.Title: ACKS II — Abilities
ACKS-ABILITIES.mech.generalHint: Marked (G) in the book — available from the general list, not only a class list.
ACKS-ABILITIES.mech.repeatable: May Be Selected More Than Once
ACKS-ABILITIES.mech.qtyHint: How many times this character has taken it — one entry carrying a count, not repeated copies. What the count means depends on the ability: another rank of the same thing, or another pick from its list.
ACKS-ABILITIES.mech.qtyConflict: Taken more than once, but this ability is not marked as repeatable — one of the two is wrong.
ACKS-ABILITIES.mech.powerValueHint: How many custom powers this counts as when building a class. Blank for proficiencies.
ACKS-ABILITIES.mech.providesHint: What this ability lets you do, named independently of this entry. A prerequisite written against a capability is met by any ability providing it — and holding the same capability twice does not stack.
ACKS-ABILITIES.mech.noEffects: No structured effects. The full text streams from your own book when connected.
ACKS-ABILITIES.warn.libMissing: acks-lib is not active — the effect vocabulary is unavailable.
ACKS-ABILITIES.warn.deprecated: Removed in ACKS II — kept so older or converted sources still resolve.
ACKS-ABILITIES.warn.aliasOf: Its rules text is printed under
ACKS-ABILITIES.warn.aliasTip: A distinct ability that shares another entry's rules text. It does not stack with that entry.
ACKS-ABILITIES.warn.unauditedTip: These mechanics were classified from your book by a generic scan and no one has verified them against the printed page. A number's meaning depends on its sentence, so treat values with care — the printed text is authoritative. The notice clears once the cookbook entry passes its audit.
ACKS-ABILITIES.roll.hint: Each roll this ability offers. A target that changes with level or rank shows its whole progression.
ACKS-ABILITIES.roll.none: No rolls. Either this ability makes none, or the rolls come from your own book once it is connected.
ACKS-ABILITIES.roll.noTarget: No target on a shared item — open the copy on a character
ACKS-ABILITIES.mech.selectionsHint: What each take chose, comma-separated and order-aligned with Times Taken - the weapon group, style, discipline, or other pick this ability spends its takes on. Leave blank for abilities where a repeat deepens a rank instead of widening a list.
